title: Mandevilla illustris
taxonomy: Mandevilla illustris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Mandevilla illustris is commonly known as a type of tropical vine. It is closely related to other Mandevilla species, which are known for their showy, trumpet-shaped flowers. Mandevilla illustris is also sometimes referred to as a type of Dipladenia.
